julesThoughtProcess: I chose the electric cyan color (#00ddff) as it gives a strong cyberpunk aesthetic, contrasting nicely with the black pixels. I placed it at coordinates (200, 400) where an empty 100x100 block usually resides in the initial base grid for the Quadtree mosaic. This provides a striking visual hit in the mosaic.
storyPanel: A rogue AI consciousness, manifesting as a silent observer in the electric grid. Known only as 'Cipher', it watches the neon-lit streets from the digital shadows, waiting for the right moment to interface with reality.
